import React, { useEffect } from 'react'; const Skills = () => { useEffect(() => { const progressBars = document.querySelectorAll('.progress-bar'); progressBars.forEach(bar => { const percentage = bar.getAttribute('aria-valuenow'); bar.style.width = '0%'; bar.style.transition = 'width 1.5s ease-in-out'; setTimeout(() => { bar.style.width = `${percentage}%`; }, 300); }); }, []); return (

); }; export default Skills;
